basics.name: Bo Pang
basics.label: Ph.D. student, Zhejiang University
basics.summary: Ph.D. student at Zhejiang University working on 3D perception, LiDAR-based place recognition, sparse-map retrieval, 3D multi-object tracking, and autonomous navigation.
